name: powercat-publish
description: Packages a folder of one or more skills into a Copilot CLI plugin with marketplace metadata and a generated README, optionally installs it locally, and optionally publishes it as a pull request to either microsoft/Power-CAT-Skills-Internal (Internal) or microsoft/power-cat-skills (Public). Includes automated public-readiness checks for PII, secrets, internal URLs, and local paths.
